description:
Math on a Sheet of Glass, Extended with User-Made Scripties. A WinUI 3 Calculator for Windows 11!

Lamina ✦ is a WinUI 3 calculator that is not only includes a Regular Calculator but also something called "Scripties". She supports Mensuration, Finance, Currency Conversion, Unit Conversions And More!, making her a Very Extendable Option.
- BRAND NEW Dynamo Scripties Loader ( DSL ) !!!! Now you can make your OWN Scripties using nothing more than a JSON File!!!! ( Basically a Digital Programming Calculator ).
- Updated to Latest SDK for Windows 11 26H1 Series.
- Small Tweaks in Currency Converter to Prevent Overflow.
- Calculator renamed to Basic Calculator as Advanced Calculator Coming Next Update!
- Removed the Lamina.Core Annoyance and Newtonsoft.json is NO LONGER USED. So yeah 3MB reduced!
- Added NCalc for DSL.
- An Advanced Calculator Mode is in the Works! Coming in v11.28000.17.0! 😉
